items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
items.summary: Select one existing inference path conversationally, obtain separate explicit consent for verification, then collect a preferred name and first objective into a memory-only mirror.
acceptance: Natural runtime/provider selection resolves one explicit choice, exclusions, or delegated recommendation without guessing ambiguous multi-choice answers
Provider verification is separately consent-gated, billing-disclosed, and performs no installation mutation
workframe begin collects preferred name and first objective only after a verified link
The first mirror remains memory-only and distinguishes unresolved purpose, constraints, and success criteria
Package checks and packed npm-bin smoke checks pass without live credentials

workflow.notes: Implementation is ready for independent review. No publication, live provider verification, or host mutation occurred.

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
items.summary: Represent installed, authenticated, inference-capable, tool-capable, scheduling-capable, and billing-owner properties without equating detection with authority.

items.title: Provider-neutral model-assisted dialogue
items.summary: Use the selected verified inference path for bounded conversational interpretation while deterministic code retains consent, authority, and mutation decisions.

items.title: Constitutional entity and goal draft
items.summary: Derive reviewable constitution, doctrine, identity, purpose, constraints, goals, and success criteria from the Socratic session without writing until approved.

items.title: Non-destructive Architectonic composition plan
items.summary: Inspect existing Architectonic state, preserve unknown files, and produce an additive composition plan with conflicts and rollback steps.

items.title: Dry-run Workframe deployment plan
items.summary: Map detected host and existing runtime state to a dry-run deployment plan that performs no installation or adoption by default.

items.title: Explicit apply and rollback authority gates
items.summary: Require immutable plan review and explicit conversational approval before any filesystem, package, runtime, or deployment mutation, with rollback evidence.

items.title: Packed cross-platform Socratic CLI evidence
items.summary: Prove the packed package on Windows, macOS, and Linux, including npm-bin invocation, interruptions, ambiguous consent, credential redaction, and non-destructive reruns.

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
